text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm just a little tired.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As an Umadol who's supposed to give hope to
everyone, I know I'm not supposed to let anyone
see me looking gloomy...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time, don't I still look just as cute
when I'm sad?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's quite the dilemma... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Smart Falcon seems to be pretty tired. We
might want to reconsider her race schedule.
